summary_context: Resolved issue where assigneeName was saved as null/Unknown in reconciliationRecords. Designed a flexible name resolution helper (getAssigneeName) that supports direct ID lookup, lowercase 'employeeId', and uppercase 'Employeeid' matches, fetching name from alternative fields (Fullname, name, fullNameEn, Fullnameen). Created and executed a retroactive Firestore database backfill script (backfillNullAssigneeNames.ts) that successfully updated historical null/Unknown records in reconciliationRecords. Updated backend routes, controllers, and ReconciliationService to use this resolution logic, and ensured the frontend WorkHourComparisonTable component displays the name correctly.
